title: EpicLogin
description: The best login plugin in existence for your minecraft server.
body:
# EpicLogin
## Plugin Overview
Epic plugin comes with extra-ordinary features to secure player accounts for your minecraft server. It uses SQLite Database and Password Encryption to secure passwords from unwanted breahcers/attackers.

## Commands:

/login or /l : Login to your registered account in server.
/register or /reg : Register your account on first join.
/changepass : Change Your password if you think it might have been leaked.
/forcechangepass : This command requires admin permissions, if you've lost you account password, ask a admin to change it.

## Why Epic Login
You should choose Epic Login because it comes with cool features like auto login for sessions with same IP or if you want alt accounts, You can control them. Block Player movements until they are registered/logined. 

Store data securely with almost no-chance of breach.

Plugin comes with different version like Velocity and Paper so no matter what you form, a community or a network, you can secure yourself with EpicLogin.
